sourcesContent:
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react'; import './App.css'; const initialBooks = [ { id: 1, title: 'Na Drini cuprija', author: 'Ivo Andric', genre: 'Domaca knjizevnost', owner: 'Milica R.', city: 'Novi Sad', rating: 4.8, status: 'Slobodna', availableFrom: '2026-06-01', availableTo: '2026-07-20', condition: 'Odlicno', description: 'Roman za citanje i razmenu, pogodan za srednju skolu, fakultet i sve koji zele klasik na polici.', cover: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #c65345, #f2c36b)', }, { id: 2, title: 'Zlocin i kazna', author: 'Fjodor Dostojevski', genre: 'Klasici', owner: 'Ana D.', city: 'Beograd', rating: 4.9, status: 'Na razmeni', availableFrom: '2026-07-05', availableTo: '2026-08-15', condition: 'Dobro', description: 'Ocuvano izdanje sa nekoliko podvucenih pasusa. Idealno za ljubitelje psiholoskih romana.', cover: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #2f5d62, #a7c4bc)', }, { id: 3, title: 'Clean Code', author: 'Robert C. Martin', genre: 'Strucna literatura', owner: 'Marko S.', city: 'Nis', rating: 4.7, status: 'Slobodna', availableFrom: '2026-05-25', availableTo: '2026-06-30', condition: 'Odlicno', description: 'Prakticna knjiga za programere. Moze se pozajmiti za pripremu projekta ili ispita.', cover: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1d3557, #68b0ab)', }, { id: 4, title: 'Mali princ', author: 'Antoan de Sent Egziperi', genre: 'Beletristika', owner: 'Jovana P.', city: 'Subotica', rating: 4.6, status: 'Slobodna', availableFrom: '2026-06-10', availableTo: '2026-07-10', condition: 'Kao novo', description: 'Kratka, nezna i lepa knjiga za vikend citanje. Dostupna za razmenu na mesec dana.', cover: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #f6bd60, #84a59d)', }, ]; const initialRequests = [ { id: 101, type: 'Dodavanje knjige', user: 'Stefan L.', book: '1984', status: 'Na cekanju', }, { id: 102, type: 'Izmena dostupnosti', user: 'Ana D.', book: 'Zlocin i kazna', status: 'Na cekanju', }, { id: 103, type: 'Brisanje knjige', user: 'Milica R.', book: 'Staro izdanje gramatike', status: 'Odobreno', }, ]; const history = [ { id: 1, title: 'Proces', partner: 'Nikola M.', period: 'Mart 2026', rating: 5 }, { id: 2, title: 'Hobit', partner: 'Sara K.', period: 'April 2026', rating: 4 }, { id: 3, title: 'Algoritmi', partner: 'Lena V.', period: 'Maj 2026', rating: 5 }, ]; const genres = ['Sve knjige', 'Domaca knjizevnost', 'Klasici', 'Strucna literatura', 'Beletristika']; const roles = ['Gost', 'Korisnik', 'Administrator']; function App() { const [books, setBooks] = useState(initialBooks); const [requests, setRequests] = useState(initialRequests); const [activeRole, setActiveRole] = useState('Korisnik'); const [selectedGenre, setSelectedGenre] = useState('Sve knjige'); const [query, setQuery] = useState(''); const [selectedBookId, setSelectedBookId] = useState(initialBooks[0].id); const [exchangeDays, setExchangeDays] = useState(21); const [newBook, setNewBook] = useState({ title: '', author: '', genre: 'Beletristika', city: '', availableFrom: '', }); const filteredBooks = useMemo(() => { return books.filter((book) => { const matchesGenre = selectedGenre === 'Sve knjige' || book.genre === selectedGenre; const matchesQuery = `${book.title} ${book.author} ${book.city}` .toLowerCase() .includes(query.toLowerCase()); return matchesGenre && matchesQuery; }); }, [books, query, selectedGenre]); const selectedBook = books.find((book) => book.id === selectedBookId) || books[0]; const isGuest = activeRole === 'Gost'; const isAdmin = activeRole === 'Administrator'; function handleCreateRequest(event) { event.preventDefault(); if (!newBook.title.trim() || !newBook.author.trim()) { return; } setRequests((current) => [ { id: Date.now(), type: 'Dodavanje knjige', user: 'Trenutni korisnik', book: newBook.title, status: 'Na cekanju', }, ...current, ]); setNewBook({ title: '', author: '', genre: 'Beletristika', city: '', availableFrom: '', }); } function handleExchange(book) { if (isGuest) { setActiveRole('Korisnik'); return; } setRequests((current) => [ { id: Date.now(), type: 'Zahtev za razmenu', user: 'Trenutni korisnik', book: book.title, status: 'Na cekanju', }, ...current, ]); } function updateRequestStatus(id, status) { setRequests((current) => current.map((request) => (request.id === id ? { ...request, status } : request))); } function markAsExchanged(bookId) { setBooks((current) => current.map((book) => (book.id === bookId ? { ...book, status: 'Na razmeni' } : book)), ); } return (

Online razmena bez kupovine

Pronadji, ponudi i prati knjige koje kruze kroz tvoju citaonicku mrezu.

Interfejs pokriva pregled knjiga za goste, prosirene akcije za ulogovane korisnike i administratorsko odobravanje zahteva.

Zanr
{genres.map((genre) => ( ))}

Pristup

{isGuest ? 'Gost vidi katalog' : 'Aktivan nalog'}

{isGuest ? 'Za slanje zahteva, ocenjivanje i istoriju razmena potrebna je prijava.' : 'Mozes da saljes zahteve, ponudis knjigu i pratis aktivnosti.'}

Katalog

Dostupne knjige

{filteredBooks.length} rezultata
{filteredBooks.map((book) => (
setSelectedBookId(book.id)} >
{book.genre}

{book.title}

{book.author}

{book.city} {book.rating.toFixed(1)}
))}

Detalji

{selectedBook.description}

)}

{isGuest ? 'Zakljucano' : 'Dostupno'}

{item.title} {item.partner}
{item.period} {item.rating}/5
))}

Administrator

Zahtevi

{requests.length} ukupno
{requests.map((request) => (
{request.type} {request.book} - {request.user}

{request.status}

{isAdmin && (
)}
))}
); } export default App;
